case_title: JOUX, THIERRY F VS KWOK, WILSON M

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KWOK, WILSON M
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KWOK, WILSON M
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,665.45 FILED BY JOUX, THIERRY F AS TO DEFENDANT KWOK, WILSON M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOUX, THIERRY F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWOK, WILSON M $1,367.29 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,487.29, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES OF $517.29 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE AND LOSS OF USE; AND $750 FOR GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR PERSONAL INJURY. IF PAYMENT PREVIOUSLY HAS BEEN MADE TO PLAINTIFF ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF FOR SUCH DAMAGES, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
